overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in wizard robes walking through a snowy landscape toward a large Gothic castle. The character traverses a rural path, passes through a stone gate onto a cobblestone road, and continues across a stone bridge with the castle becoming increasingly prominent in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered path next to a stone cottage wall. Wooden barriers line the left side of the path while snow-covered trees and mountains fill the background. A sheep grazes in the field to the left as the character approaches a wooden gate in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a wooden gate flanked by stone posts, transitioning from the open field onto a winding cobblestone path. Stone walls line both sides of the path, and vintage lamp posts appear along the right side as the journey continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cobblestone road with stone walls and mountain views

events.description: Hogwarts castle becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone path with snow-capped mountains visible to the left

entered.detail: large Gothic castle with multiple towers and spires on a distant hill

segments.scene_description: The cobblestone path winds through a snowy landscape with stone walls and vintage lamp posts lining the route. The massive Gothic structure of Hogwarts castle emerges in the distance ahead, framed by snow-covered mountains on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge with balustrades overlooking valley

agents.ego_description: walking across the stone bridge toward the castle, passing another student sitting on a bench

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a stone bench facing the castle

decorative black iron lamp posts mounted on stone pedestals
stone seating along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character walks onto a wide stone bridge with ornate balustrades and lamp posts. Hogwarts castle dominates the view ahead, growing larger as the bridge approaches the main entrance. Another student sits on a stone bench to the right, overlooking the snowy valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy rural landscape that gradually transitions into the imposing architecture of a Gothic castle. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered path beside a stone cottage wall and grazing sheep, moving toward a distant wooden gate. As the character passes through the gate, the open field shifts into a winding cobblestone path lined with stone walls and vintage lamp posts. The scene then expands to reveal the massive structure of Hogwarts castle emerging against a backdrop of snow-covered mountains. Finally, the path leads onto a wide stone bridge with ornate balustrades, where the castle dominates the view and grows larger as the character approaches the main entrance.
